Author: mole99
Content:
Yesterday, in between my other work, I created a simple 2.5D stackup for gf180mcuD from Poly2 to Metal5 including MIM Option B (as on wafer.space).

It will be included in the open_pdks build tomorrow, which you can get the via [Ciel](https://github.com/fossi-foundation/ciel): https://github.com/RTimothyEdwards/open_pdks/pull/517
